problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
